steps.title: Find the y-intercept of the function
steps.content:
In the function $f(x) = -9x + 54$, which has the form $y = mx + b$, the y-intercept is the constant term $b = 54$. We can verify this by evaluating at $x = 0$:

$$f(0) = -9(0) + 54 = 54$$

steps.title: Interpret what x = 0 means in context
steps.content:
Since $x$ represents the number of candles made, $x = 0$ means before any candles have been made—at the beginning. The function value $f(0) = 54$ tells us Eli had 54 ounces of wax remaining at that point. When Eli began to make the candles, he had approximately 54 ounces of wax.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
